name: Destiny HERO - Captain Tenacious
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ－ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>デステニーヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ダイハードガイ
desc: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: You can target 1 "Destiny HERO" monster in your Graveyard that was destroyed by battle since your last Standby Phase, if you controlled this face-up card when the target was destroyed; Special Summon that target.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: You can target 1 "Destiny HERO" monster in your Graveyard that was destroyed by battle since your last Standby Phase, if you controlled this face-up card when the target was destroyed; Special Summon that target.
